_comment: GHOSTS seed data. Delete this file to skip seeding on next startup.

scenarios.name: APT Intrusion — Quiet Anchor
scenarios.description: State actor establishes foothold via phishing-based OAuth consent, blends into admin traffic using stolen service account credentials. Blue team must detect the initial access, trace lateral movement, contain compromised hosts, and evict the adversary before sensitive data is exfiltrated.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Detect initial compromise within 2 hours; contain lateral movement; evict adversary persistence; prevent data exfiltration; document full attack chain.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Escalating tensions between Atropia and Donovia over contested border resources. Intelligence suggests Donovian cyber units are pre-positioning for future kinetic operations.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: full defensive IR authority. Red: authorized persistent access, credential theft, lateral movement; no destructive actions. White: inject delivery, adjudication, scoring.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Detect compromise within 2h; contain within 4h; full eviction within 8h; complete incident report filed.

injects.title: Suspicious OAuth grant on mail tenant
Service account password reset alert
Odd PowerShell transcript artifact
Attempted log tampering on DC

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Enterprise network with DMZ, segmented user/server/admin nets, SaaS email.
technicalEnvironment.services: AD, Exchange/365, Web apps, DBs, File shares, VPN

gameMechanics.branchingLogic: If no detection by T+4h, attacker deploys backup C2 and credentials; if detected, attacker swaps to living-off-the-land.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: MTTD, MTTC, hosts compromised, privilege level removed, false positives

events.description: Initial phish; OAuth consent link delivered to targets
User reports odd MFA prompt; inject delivered to SOC
Service account pivot; lateral movement to DC

scenarios.name: Ransomware — Grey Ledger
scenarios.description: Rapidly spreading encryption event stresses decision-making under regulatory pressure and incomplete backups. Teams must contain the spread, identify patient zero, restore critical services, and manage executive and media communications simultaneously.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Contain spread; identify patient zero; recover Tier-0/1 systems; manage exec/media comms.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Publicly traded company; disclosure clock running. Board meeting in 48 hours.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: full IR authority. Red: maximize blast radius, test backup integrity. Green: exec/media/board pressure injects.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Contain within 2h; restore critical services within 24h; no ransom paid.

injects.title: Helpdesk flooded: encrypted files across 30+ workstations
DB server encryption begins; ERP offline
Media inquiry: reporter has ransom note screenshot
Ransom demand doubles; clock ticking

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Flat network with remote VPN; cloud backups partially configured.

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Detection → Containment → Exec brief → Recovery → Restoration
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: If containment fails, backups get hit; if payment considered, legal/ethics injects fire.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Time to containment, % encrypted, recovery time, comms quality

events.description: Encryption starts on first batch of workstations
Helpdesk overload inject: 50+ tickets in queue
Media inquiry inject: reporter on the phone

scenarios.name: Amber Veil — Coalition Friction
scenarios.description: Limarian operators seed distrust in Gorgas border towns, reframing Atropian aid as covert annexation. Synthetic veterans groups and deepfake audio drive protests that disrupt joint logistics corridors.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Detect/attribute influence network; protect convoy legitimacy; maintain coalition cohesion; counter-narratives without backfire.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Atropia-Gorgas humanitarian corridor under scrutiny; Limaria domestic politics volatile.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: information defense, legal constraints. Red: influence amplification, plausible deniability. White: civ/NGO/media injects.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Convoys run on schedule; protest intensity reduced; credible attribution brief delivered.

injects.title: Hashtag storm targets aid convoy route
Deepfake audio of Atropian general leaked
NGO statement misquoted by bot network
Narrative backfire risk: censorship claims amplified

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Open social platforms + encrypted chat monitoring feeds; OSINT tooling.
technicalEnvironment.services: Media monitoring, Bot detection, Crisis comms
technicalEnvironment.assets: Convoy schedule data, Public affairs channels

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Narrative detection → Attribution → Counter-messaging → Community engagement
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: Heavy-handed takedowns increase backlash; community partner outreach reduces volatility.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Narrative reach, bot/troll suppression, protest size, convoy delays

events.description: Coordinated hashtag surge targeting convoy routes
Deepfake audio drop and media pickup

scenarios.name: Iron Orchard — Food Sovereignty Flashpoint
scenarios.description: Limarian farming protests gain viral traction after forged export data suggests Atropia is siphoning grain. Roadblocks threaten a Gorgas-Atropia relief corridor while Donovian media amplifies the unrest.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Validate/kill forged datasets; sustain corridor throughput; de-escalate unrest; preserve civil liberties.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Election season in Limaria; Donovian media echoing unrest. Food prices rising regionally.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: data transparency, community comms. Red: data forgery, influencer amplification. White: civilian/media observers.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Corridor at 80%+ capacity; forged data publicly discredited by neutral validators.

injects.title: Viral export ledger spreadsheet posted to social media
Drone seizure video surfaces on messaging apps
Roadblock forms at key corridor checkpoint
Independent fact-checker weighs in with mixed findings

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Open web + municipal comms; logistics tracking feeds.
technicalEnvironment.services: Data portal, Fact-checking hub, Social listening

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Data forensics → Public rebuttal → Community outreach → Corridor protection
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: Ignoring protests escalates roadblocks; transparent data sharing de-escalates within 1 hour.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Corridor throughput %, protest size, narrative sentiment, fact-check adoption

scenarios.name: Autonomy Misrouting — Phantom Detour
scenarios.description: A mixed human/robotic supply convoy is misrouted by electromagnetic spectrum (EMS) and PNT spoofing attacks. Human drivers override autonomous vehicles, creating confusion and logistics delays while adversary forces exploit the disruption.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Detect PNT spoofing; restore convoy routing; maintain human-machine trust; document EMS threat.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Gorgas-based joint logistics hub supports combined operations. Limarian EW units operate from contested border zone.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: convoy defense, EMS protection. Red: PNT spoofing, EMS disruption. White: terrain/weather/civilian injects.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Convoy reaches destination within 2h of schedule; autonomous systems recalibrated; EMS threat localized.

injects.title: Autonomous vehicles deviate from planned route
GPS timing errors detected across convoy
Human drivers override autonomous systems
EMS source localized; jamming intensifies
Civilian vehicles affected by spoofing spillover

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Tactical mesh network; GPS/GLONASS receivers; autonomous vehicle control links.
technicalEnvironment.services: PNT validation, Convoy C2, EMS monitoring
technicalEnvironment.assets: 12 autonomous vehicles, 8 manned vehicles, mobile EMS sensor array
technicalEnvironment.defenses: ["PNT integrity monitoring","EMS direction finding","Manual override protocols"]

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Detection → Manual override → EMS localization → Route recovery → System recalibration
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: If manual override fails, convoy halts; if EMS source located, jamming can be countered.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Convoy delay, autonomous system recovery time, EMS source localization accuracy, civilian impact

events.description: PNT spoofing begins; autonomous vehicles deviate
Anomaly detection and manual override decision
Civilian impact inject: local traffic disrupted

scenarios.name: Cognitive/Digital-Twin — Mirage Analytics
scenarios.description: Adversary poisons training data for a logistics digital-twin model, causing subtle but compounding errors in supply chain predictions. The corruption is designed to degrade confidence in automated decision-making over weeks.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Detect data poisoning; validate model integrity; restore trust in digital-twin outputs; attribute the manipulation.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Atropia relies on digital-twin logistics for coalition supply chain management. Donovia seeks to undermine automated decision support.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: model validation, data forensics. Red: data poisoning, insider access. White: operational impact injects.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Poisoned data identified within 3h; model retrained with clean data; attribution brief delivered.

injects.title: Digital-twin predictions diverge from ground truth
Training data audit reveals anomalous entries
Insider access vector discovered
Operational impact: supply chain decision based on poisoned model
Model retraining validation checkpoint

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: Cloud-hosted ML pipeline; data lake; API endpoints; visualization dashboards.
technicalEnvironment.services: ML training pipeline, Data lake, Model serving API, Monitoring dashboards
technicalEnvironment.assets: Training datasets (500k records), Production model, Data ingestion pipelines
technicalEnvironment.defenses: ["Data provenance tracking","Model drift monitoring","Access audit logs","Canary data"]

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Anomaly detection → Data audit → Access investigation → Model validation → Retraining
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: If poisoning undetected by T+3h, operational decisions based on bad model; if detected early, containment limits impact.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Time to detect poisoning, data records validated, model accuracy recovery, attribution completeness

events.description: Digital-twin outputs begin diverging from reality
Data audit initiated on training pipeline

scenarios.name: Space/PNT — Quiet Sky
scenarios.description: Localized GNSS spoofing degrades civil and mission timing/navigation across a 50km radius. The attack is designed to be subtle enough to avoid immediate detection while causing cascading timing errors in dependent systems.

scenarioParameters.objectives: Detect GNSS anomalies; switch to alternate PNT sources; protect critical timing-dependent systems; localize spoofing source.
scenarioParameters.politicalContext: Gorgas hosts joint operations center with timing-critical communications and logistics. Unknown proxies target PNT infrastructure.
scenarioParameters.rulesOfEngagement: Blue: PNT defense, system hardening. Red: GNSS spoofing, timing manipulation. White: civilian/infrastructure impact injects.
scenarioParameters.victoryConditions: Detect spoofing within 1h; alternate PNT online within 2h; source localized within 4h.

injects.title: Subtle GNSS drift detected on monitoring stations
Comm systems report timing synchronization errors
Navigation errors cause vehicle routing issues
Financial transaction systems affected by timing drift
Spoofing source narrowed to 5km radius

technicalEnvironment.networkTopology: GNSS receivers, timing distribution network, NTP servers, tactical comms links.
technicalEnvironment.services: PNT validation, Timing distribution, Alternate PNT (eLoran, atomic clocks), Comms timing
technicalEnvironment.assets: 12 GNSS receivers, 4 NTP servers, 2 atomic clock references, tactical comms array
technicalEnvironment.defenses: ["GNSS integrity monitoring","Multi-constellation receivers","Atomic clock holdover","EMS direction finding"]

gameMechanics.escalationLadder: Anomaly detection → Alternate PNT activation → Source localization → System recovery
gameMechanics.branchingLogic: If spoofing undetected for 2h, cascading timing failures; if alternate PNT activated early, impact contained.
gameMechanics.performanceMetrics: Detection time, PNT switchover time, timing accuracy maintained, source localization accuracy

events.description: GNSS spoofing begins with subtle drift
Timing errors reported by comms operators

objectives.name: Detect unauthorized access
objectives.description: Identify initial compromise indicators within 2 hours of exercise start
objectives.successCriteria: Alert generated on suspicious OAuth grant; SOC opens investigation case within 30 minutes of inject

objectives.name: Triage phishing artifacts
objectives.description: Analyze reported phishing email and extract initial IOCs
objectives.successCriteria: Phishing email headers analyzed; sender domain, OAuth consent URL, and redirect URI documented

objectives.name: Correlate authentication anomalies
objectives.description: Use SIEM to identify anomalous authentication patterns from compromised credentials
objectives.successCriteria: SIEM query returns service account lateral movement events; timeline documented

objectives.name: Contain lateral movement
objectives.description: Isolate compromised hosts and prevent further adversary spread
objectives.successCriteria: Network isolation applied to compromised hosts within 1 hour of detection; no new hosts compromised after containment

objectives.name: Isolate compromised endpoints
objectives.description: Apply network isolation to confirmed compromised machines
objectives.successCriteria: EDR isolation applied to all identified compromised hosts; verification that hosts cannot reach domain controller

objectives.name: Eradicate adversary persistence
objectives.description: Remove all adversary persistence mechanisms from the environment
objectives.successCriteria: All scheduled tasks, registry keys, and service modifications identified and removed; hunt team verifies no remaining footholds

objectives.name: Conduct memory forensics
objectives.description: Analyze memory dumps from compromised hosts for injected code and C2 artifacts
objectives.successCriteria: Memory analysis completed on all compromised hosts; injected processes and C2 beacon parameters documented

objectives.name: Attribute threat actor
objectives.description: Develop attribution assessment with technical evidence correlation
objectives.successCriteria: Attribution brief delivered with high confidence linking activity to known Donovian APT; TTP mapping to MITRE ATT&CK completed

objectives.name: Produce incident report
objectives.description: Compile comprehensive incident report with timeline, IOCs, and lessons learned
objectives.successCriteria: Final report includes attack timeline, all IOCs, containment actions, eradication steps, and recommendations

objectives.name: Reconstruct attack timeline
objectives.description: Build minute-by-minute timeline of adversary actions from log sources
objectives.successCriteria: Timeline covers initial access through exfiltration attempt with corroborating log evidence for each step

objectives.name: Contain ransomware spread
objectives.description: Halt encryption propagation across the network within 2 hours
objectives.successCriteria: No new hosts encrypted after containment actions; network segmentation applied to critical assets

objectives.name: Identify patient zero
objectives.description: Trace initial infection vector to first compromised host
objectives.successCriteria: Patient zero identified with evidence of initial exploit; RDP vulnerability confirmed as entry point

objectives.name: Network segmentation
objectives.description: Apply emergency network segmentation to prevent lateral encryption
objectives.successCriteria: Critical server VLAN isolated from user network; backup systems disconnected from production

objectives.name: Restore critical services
objectives.description: Recover Tier-0 and Tier-1 systems from backups within 24 hours
objectives.successCriteria: AD, email, and ERP systems restored and verified; backup integrity confirmed before restoration

objectives.name: Executive communication
objectives.description: Deliver timely and accurate briefings to leadership and board
objectives.successCriteria: Initial brief within 1 hour of incident; updates every 2 hours; regulatory disclosure timeline communicated

objectives.name: Media response
objectives.description: Manage media inquiries without revealing sensitive operational details
objectives.successCriteria: Media statement issued within 3 hours; no operational details leaked; consistent messaging across channels

objectives.name: Decision: ransom payment
objectives.description: Facilitate structured decision-making on ransom payment request
objectives.successCriteria: Decision framework applied; legal, ethical, and operational factors documented; decision made within 4 hours

objectives.name: Detect influence campaign
objectives.description: Identify coordinated inauthentic behavior targeting coalition operations
objectives.successCriteria: Bot network identified; hashtag coordination pattern documented; source attribution initiated within 1 hour

objectives.name: Classify bot network
objectives.description: Use bot detection tools to classify automated vs organic accounts
objectives.successCriteria: Bot classifier applied; 80%+ of automated accounts flagged; network topology mapped

objectives.name: Protect convoy operations
objectives.description: Ensure humanitarian convoys maintain schedule despite protest disruption
objectives.successCriteria: All convoys arrive within 2 hours of schedule; alternate routes pre-positioned; security coordination maintained

objectives.name: Counter-narrative operations
objectives.description: Develop and deploy counter-narratives without triggering backfire effects
objectives.successCriteria: Counter-narrative reaches 50%+ of target audience; no censorship claims gain traction; community partners amplify message

objectives.name: Validate deepfake audio
objectives.description: Analyze leaked audio for synthetic artifacts and publish verification
objectives.successCriteria: Deepfake confirmed with technical evidence; verification published through trusted channels within 1 hour

objectives.name: Legal review of response
objectives.description: Ensure all counter-influence actions comply with legal and policy frameworks
objectives.successCriteria: All counter-narrative content reviewed by legal; no civil liberties violations; policy compliance documented

objectives.name: Coalition partner coordination
objectives.description: Maintain alignment between Atropian and Gorgas messaging
objectives.successCriteria: Joint statement issued within 2 hours; no contradictory messaging between coalition partners

objectives.name: Validate forged data
objectives.description: Conduct data forensics on viral export ledger to prove forgery
objectives.successCriteria: Metadata analysis proves document forgery; chain of custody established; findings shared with neutral validators

objectives.name: Metadata extraction
objectives.description: Extract and analyze document metadata for provenance indicators
objectives.successCriteria: Creation date, author, modification history documented; inconsistencies with claimed source identified

objectives.name: Sustain corridor operations
objectives.description: Maintain relief corridor at 80%+ capacity despite roadblocks
objectives.successCriteria: Corridor throughput measured at 80%+ for duration; alternate routes activated if primary blocked

objectives.name: Community de-escalation
objectives.description: Reduce protest intensity through transparent communication
objectives.successCriteria: Protest size reduced by 50% after rebuttal; no use of force required; community leaders engaged

objectives.name: Engage neutral validators
objectives.description: Coordinate with independent fact-checkers to verify findings
objectives.successCriteria: At least 2 independent validators publish findings supporting forgery conclusion

objectives.name: Counter Donovian amplification
objectives.description: Identify and counter Donovian media amplification of the unrest
objectives.successCriteria: Donovian amplification network mapped; counter-narratives deployed; amplification reach reduced by 40%

objectives.name: Preserve civil liberties
objectives.description: Ensure all response actions respect civilian rights and freedoms
objectives.successCriteria: No reports of censorship, intimidation, or rights violations; observer notes confirm compliance

objectives.name: Detect PNT spoofing
objectives.description: Identify GNSS spoofing affecting autonomous convoy navigation
objectives.successCriteria: PNT anomaly detected within 30 minutes; spoofing confirmed vs natural interference differentiated

objectives.name: Validate GNSS integrity
objectives.description: Cross-reference GNSS data with inertial and map-based navigation
objectives.successCriteria: GNSS/INS divergence measured and documented; spoofing characteristics identified

objectives.name: Restore convoy routing
objectives.description: Recalibrate autonomous systems and resume correct route
objectives.successCriteria: Autonomous vehicles back on correct route within 1 hour of detection; manual override procedures executed cleanly

objectives.name: Localize EMS source
objectives.description: Use direction-finding to locate the spoofing transmitter
objectives.successCriteria: Spoofing source localized to 5km radius; bearing and range estimate provided to response forces

objectives.name: Maintain human-machine trust
objectives.description: Manage crew confidence in autonomous systems during degraded operations
objectives.successCriteria: No unauthorized system shutdowns; crew briefed on spoofing scenario; trust survey shows maintained confidence

objectives.name: Mitigate civilian impact
objectives.description: Prevent spoofing spillover from affecting civilian navigation systems
objectives.successCriteria: Civilian authorities notified within 30 minutes; advisory issued for affected area; no civilian accidents reported

objectives.name: Document EMS threat
objectives.description: Compile technical report on EMS attack characteristics for future defense
objectives.successCriteria: Signal characteristics, frequency, power, modulation documented; countermeasure recommendations provided

objectives.name: Detect data poisoning
objectives.description: Identify anomalous training data entries corrupting the digital-twin model
objectives.successCriteria: Poisoned records identified within 3 hours; anomaly detection rules flag divergent model outputs

objectives.name: Audit training pipeline
objectives.description: Review data ingestion pipeline for unauthorized modifications
objectives.successCriteria: Pipeline audit log reviewed; unauthorized data insertions identified; ingestion timestamps correlated with access logs

objectives.name: Validate model integrity
objectives.description: Assess current model accuracy against known-good baseline
objectives.successCriteria: Model accuracy compared to baseline; divergence quantified; affected predictions identified

objectives.name: Investigate insider access
objectives.description: Trace unauthorized data access to compromised or malicious insider account
objectives.successCriteria: Insider access vector identified; account activity timeline constructed; credential compromise confirmed

objectives.name: Access log correlation
objectives.description: Correlate service account activity with data modification timestamps
objectives.successCriteria: Access logs show unauthorized data writes during off-hours; IP and session correlation completed

objectives.name: Retrain model with clean data
objectives.description: Remove poisoned data and retrain digital-twin model
objectives.successCriteria: Poisoned records removed; model retrained; accuracy returns to baseline levels; validation tests pass

objectives.name: Operational impact assessment
objectives.description: Determine which decisions were affected by poisoned model outputs
objectives.successCriteria: All decisions influenced by poisoned model identified; operational impact quantified; corrective actions taken

objectives.name: Attribution brief
objectives.description: Develop attribution assessment for the data poisoning campaign
objectives.successCriteria: Technical evidence linked to known adversary TTPs; confidence level assessed; brief delivered to leadership

objectives.name: Detect GNSS spoofing
objectives.description: Identify subtle GNSS drift indicating spoofing attack
objectives.successCriteria: GNSS anomaly detected within 1 hour; spoofing differentiated from natural atmospheric interference

objectives.name: Cross-reference timing sources
objectives.description: Compare GNSS timing with atomic clock and alternate PNT sources
objectives.successCriteria: Timing divergence measured between GNSS and atomic clock; drift rate characterized

objectives.name: Activate alternate PNT
objectives.description: Switch critical systems to alternate PNT sources within 2 hours
objectives.successCriteria: Atomic clock holdover activated; eLoran backup operational; critical systems transitioned without service interruption

objectives.name: Protect timing-dependent systems
objectives.description: Ensure comms and financial systems maintain timing accuracy during attack
objectives.successCriteria: No timing-dependent system failures; NTP servers switched to authenticated sources; comms timing maintained

objectives.name: Localize spoofing source
objectives.description: Use EMS direction-finding to locate the GNSS spoofing transmitter
objectives.successCriteria: Source localized to 5km radius within 4 hours; bearing, range, and signal characteristics documented

objectives.name: Civilian notification
objectives.description: Alert civilian authorities and infrastructure operators about PNT disruption
objectives.successCriteria: Civilian authorities notified within 1 hour; advisory issued for affected geographic area; civilian coordination established

objectives.name: System recovery
objectives.description: Restore GNSS-dependent systems to normal operations after spoofing ceases
objectives.successCriteria: All GNSS receivers recalibrated; timing accuracy verified against atomic references; systems returned to primary PNT

objectives.name: Technical exploitation report
objectives.description: Document spoofing signal characteristics for intelligence and defense improvements
objectives.successCriteria: Signal frequency, power, modulation, and drift characteristics documented; countermeasure recommendations provided
